mentions.note: New IPO (March 20); spun from Healthpeak. 100% pure-play senior housing, company-operated. Only 10,422 units (34 communities) vs. Ventas/Welltower; Florida/Texas 69%, Philadelphia 9%. Life plan communities (15/34) offer continuum of care, longer resident stays. 37x prior-year FFO (reasonable). 2.5% yield (57¢/share). Smaller = faster growth potential. Newer story = riskier but 'leap of faith I'd be comfortable making.' Healthpeak retains control, manages operations.
